source.name: User-provided dark Liquid Glass screenshot
source.license_notes: User-provided visual reference for personal knowledge base. Store summarized observations, not redistributed original images.

layout_rules: Use dark glass for selected or premium states, not every surface on the page.
Pair black translucent fills with strong white text and neon accent rings.
Keep the outer rim bright enough to separate the component from the background.
Use neon gradients in small rings, checks, toggles, or active tabs instead of full-screen saturation.
accessibility_notes: White text on black glass is usually safer than muted gray text.
Neon accents should not be the only indicator of success or selection.
Check contrast after blur because background colors can reduce readability.
implementation_hints: Use rgba(8, 10, 16, 0.72) with backdrop blur for dark glass surfaces.
Add cyan/magenta/orange radial gradients as edge glints and small internal rings.
Use larger shadow offsets and lower opacity to make dark glass feel heavy and polished.

quality.notes: Derived from the user's dark liquid glass screenshot with black glossy controls and neon highlights.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use dark Liquid Glass for premium dark-mode components: black translucent glossy surfaces, neon rim light, white readable text, small rainbow caustics, and selected-state icon rings.
